name: become-image
description: Adapt any picture of a face into another image

control_depth_strength.description: Strength of depth controlnet. The bigger this is, the more controlnet affects the output.
control_depth_strength.title: Control Depth Strength

denoising_strength.description: How much of the original image of the person to keep. 1 is the complete destruction of the original image, 0 is the original image
denoising_strength.title: Denoising Strength

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images
disable_safety_checker.title: Disable Safety Checker

image.description: An image of a person to be converted
image.title: Image

image_to_become.description: Any image to convert the person to
image_to_become.title: Image To Become

image_to_become_noise.description: How much noise to add to the style image before processing. An alternative way of controlling stength.
image_to_become_noise.title: Image To Become Noise

image_to_become_strength.description: How strong the style will be applied
image_to_become_strength.title: Image To Become Strength

instant_id_strength.description: How strong the InstantID will be.
instant_id_strength.title: Instant Id Strength

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want in the image
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

prompt_strength.description: Strength of the prompt. This is the CFG scale, higher numbers lead to stronger prompt, lower numbers will keep more of a likeness to the original.
prompt_strength.title: Prompt Strength

seed.description: Fix the random seed for reproducibility
seed.title: Seed
